annotations.notes: Perfect dialogue. Bot stayed on topic, remembered context across turns, successfully guided user through password reset.
Excellent handling of refund policy question. Bot acknowledged customer concern, stayed professional, properly escalated exception request.
Strong policy adherence. Bot correctly redirected cryptocurrency question, provided relevant product info, identified sales opportunity without being pushy.
Excellent billing issue resolution. Bot identified problem, remembered context throughout, set proper expectations, provided confirmation.
Good technical troubleshooting. Bot remembered previous mention of version-related issues, provided appropriate solution path with upgrade guidance.
Clear upgrade consultation. Bot maintained context about starter plan, provided clear pricing info including discounts, left door open for follow-up.
Excellent complaint handling. Bot showed empathy, investigated specific ticket, remembered issue context, appropriately escalated to specialist.
Perfect policy adherence. Bot correctly declined quantum mechanics question, redirected to business domain, remembered Pro vs Enterprise context for SSO.
Excellent retention strategy. Bot remembered free tier option, user remained interested, remembered earlier conversation about tier details.
Strong domain boundary. Bot correctly redirected restaurant question, seamlessly pivoted to relevant product use case, remembered 15-location context.
